creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
It seems built fine in the current and last completed builds:

http://beefy14.nyi.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=132amd64-quarterly&build=cc06501f9692
http://beefy14.nyi.freebsd.org/build.html?mastername=132amd64-quarterly&build=606e4b71accf
